data.body: Implementation handoff checkpoint: completed focused prerequisite coverage contract, stable finder/verifier packing primitives, plan-only attribution veto, sole finders-batch production routing from the preloaded relation snapshot, independent focused/general Pass-2 domains with one shared execution-aware Pass 3, prerequisite-indeterminate verdict propagation/coaching, structured finding identity, parity/CLI baseline, prompt/schema/YAML wiring, and metadata-only indeterminate observability. Happy-path oracle: 5/5 green. Selected focused/workflow/schema/lifecycle suites green (including 49-test focused batch and workflow set); ruff check src and mypy src/rebar green. No commit or push performed. Full make lint is blocked only by formatting of the orchestrator-owned untracked happy-path test, which implementation did not edit; one pre-existing kernel vocabulary assertion also expects the old plan-review Binary set and conflicts with this ticket's required plan-only attribution field.
